title: viola schariensis
intro: Viola schariensis, also known as yellow or purple mountain pansy, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the violet family. It is used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which can help to soothe and protect the skin and mucous membranes. The health benefits of Viola schariensis include reducing symptoms of anxiety and insomnia, as well as alleviating pain and inflammation. Herbal preparations of Viola schariensis include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
